parameters.content:
## 📊 Campaign Send-Time Optimizer

**Goal:** Analyse your Klaviyo email campaign history to identify which send times produce the highest open and click rates per audience segment. Delivers a ranked HTML report every Monday at 8:00 AM.

### How it works
1. **Schedule** fires every Monday at 8 AM (or trigger manually for on-demand runs).
2. **Config** holds the central settings — lookback window (90 days) and minimum campaigns per slot (3).
3. **Get Sent Campaigns** paginates the Klaviyo Campaigns API to pull every email campaign.
4. **Flatten Campaigns** filters to Sent status within the window, extracts the UTC send hour, and builds an audience-segment key.
5. **Fetch Lists** retrieves all list names for human-readable labels in the final report.
6. **Get Campaign Stats** posts a single bulk request to the campaign-values-reports endpoint and returns open + click rates.
7. **Aggregate by Hour** joins metadata with stats, groups into (audience × hour) buckets, and averages each.
8. **Format Email Report** ranks segments by best open rate, adds medal icons for the top 3 slots per segment.
9. **Gmail — Send Report** delivers the styled HTML email to your configured inbox.

## ⚠️ Critical — Do before activation

**The workflow will fail or send to the wrong recipient if you skip these:**

### 🔑 Credentials
- **Klaviyo API Key** — required on three HTTP Request nodes (`Get Sent Campaigns`, `Fetch Lists`, `Get Campaign Stats`). Generate at *Klaviyo → Account → Settings → API Keys*. Use a Private API Key with `campaigns:read` + `lists:read` + `metrics:read` scopes.
- **Gmail OAuth2** — required on both Gmail nodes. The Error Alert uses a separate credential from the report sender so a failure in the sender's auth doesn't suppress its own error message.

### 📧 Recipient addresses
- **Gmail — Send Report** → currently `user@example.com`. Update to your inbox.
- **Gmail — Error Alert** → currently `user@example.com`. Update to your monitoring inbox (can be same as above).

### 🎯 conversion_metric_id
The body of **Get Campaign Stats** hardcodes `X7ghUW` (Klaviyo's default Shopify *Placed Order* metric). If your store uses Shopify, you're fine. If not, replace with your account's primary conversion metric ID — find it at *Klaviyo → Account → Settings → Custom Metrics*.

### ⏱️ Timezone
All times in the final report are **UTC** by design. If you want local time, edit the `getUTCHours()` call in *Flatten Campaigns* and the label format in *Aggregate by Hour*.

### 📥 Setup & Klaviyo Data Pull

Triggers on the weekly schedule, loads the central config (lookback window + confidence threshold), then makes three Klaviyo API calls in sequence — first to fetch all email campaigns with cursor pagination, then to fetch list names for readable labels, finally a bulk POST to the campaign-values-reports endpoint for open and click rates.

### 📤 Analysis & Report Delivery

Joins campaign metadata with stats, groups them into (audience × send_hour) buckets and averages each metric. Slots with fewer than 3 campaigns are flagged as statistically thin. The formatter ranks each segment by best open rate, awards medal icons to the top 3 slots, and the Gmail node delivers the styled HTML report.

nodes.name: Schedule — Weekly Monday
nodes.notes: Entry point. Fires every Monday at 8:00 AM automatically. Trigger manually from the canvas to run on demand at any time.

nodes.name: Config
nodes.notes: Central configuration. Edit lookback_days (default 90) or min_campaigns_per_slot (default 3) here to adjust the analysis window and confidence threshold without touching any code nodes.

nodes.name: Get Sent Campaigns
nodes.notes: Klaviyo Campaigns API — fetches all email campaigns using cursor-based pagination (follows links.next automatically, up to 20 pages). Filters to email channel at the API level. Requires: Klaviyo API Key credential.

nodes.name: Flatten Campaigns
nodes.notes: Parses the paginated Klaviyo response (handles n8n double-serialization). Filters to status=Sent campaigns within the 90-day window. Extracts UTC send hour from scheduled_at. Builds audience segment key from included list IDs. Throws a descriptive error if no campaigns pass the filter.

nodes.name: Fetch Lists
nodes.notes: Klaviyo Lists API — retrieves all list names in a single call. Converts raw IDs (e.g. RQVVZj) into human-readable names (e.g. VIP Customers) in the final report. Requires: Klaviyo API Key credential.

nodes.name: Get Campaign Stats
nodes.notes: Single bulk POST to Klaviyo campaign-values-reports endpoint. Returns open_rate and click_rate per campaign for the last 90 days. conversion_metric_id X7ghUW is the Shopify Placed Order metric — required by Klaviyo's reporting API.

nodes.name: Aggregate by Hour
nodes.notes: Core analysis node. Joins campaign metadata (from Flatten Campaigns) with stats (from Get Campaign Stats). Builds a list name lookup from Fetch Lists. Groups campaigns into (audience x send_hour) buckets, averages open rates and click rates. Flags slots with fewer than 3 campaigns as statistically thin.

nodes.name: Format Email Report
nodes.notes: Builds the ranked HTML email. Sorts audience segments by best open rate first. Within each segment shows up to 5 time slots with medal icons for top 3. Resolves raw audience IDs to list names using the nameMap from Aggregate by Hour.

nodes.name: Gmail — Send Report
nodes.notes: Delivers the weekly HTML send-time report to the configured inbox. Update the Send To address before activating the workflow.

nodes.name: Gmail — Error Alert
nodes.notes: Sends a failure notification email with the error message, the name of the failing node, and the execution start time. Update the Send To address before activating the workflow.

parameters.message:
=

The Campaign Send-Time Optimizer workflow failed.

Error:{{ $json.execution.error.message }}
Node:{{ $json.execution.error.node.name }}
Started:{{ $json.execution.startedAt }}

Please check your n8n instance for the full execution log.
parameters.subject: ⚠️ Send-Time Optimizer Failed

nodes.name: Error Trigger
nodes.notes: Catches any unhandled error thrown by any node in the main workflow chain. Passes error details — message, node name, execution time — to Gmail Error Alert.

parameters.content:
### 🛟 Error Handling Branch

Catches any unhandled failure from the main workflow chain and emails a structured alert with the error message, the failing node's name, and the execution start time — so you know within minutes that Monday morning's report didn't arrive.
